creator: oz42@oz42.eu
text:
My make.conf:

OPTIONS_UNSET= NIS
OPTIONS_UNSET+= X11
OPTIONS_UNSET+= DOCS
OPTIONS_UNSET+= DEBUG
OPTIONS_UNSET+= WAYLAND
